Interface IMultidimensionalDataset6

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a multidimensional dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A4AB2BB9-4530-486F-A11B-3C8F6D214C20")]
public interface IMultidimensionalDataset6 : IMultidimensionalDataset5, IMultidimensionalDataset4, IMultidimensionalDataset3, IMultidimensionalDataset2, IMultidimensionalDataset
